Class CrosstabMeasureBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.AbstractBuilder<CrosstabMeasureBuilder<T>, DRCrosstabMeasure<T>>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.crosstab.CrosstabMeasureBuilder<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRICrosstabValue<T>, DRIValue<T>, Serializable
public class CrosstabMeasureBuilder<T> extends AbstractBuilder<CrosstabMeasureBuilder<T>, DRCrosstabMeasure<T>> implements DRICrosstabValue<T>

CrosstabMeasureBuilder class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca, Jan Moxter
